title: Sourcemeta One Schema Evaluate RPC Input
description: Evaluate a JSON instance against a schema in the catalog and return whether it is valid plus any errors

schema.description: Absolute URI of a JSON Schema in this catalog

stringifiedInstance.description: The JSON value to validate against the schema, encoded as a string of valid JSON. The server parses this string before validation, so non-string MCP clients can still send objects, numbers, booleans, null, or arrays without losing the JSON type
stringifiedInstance.$comment: Accepting the instance as a JSON-encoded string is a workaround for MCP clients that stringify non-string tool arguments before sending them. See https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/24599 and https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk/issues/1112
